title: rosa × damascena var. balcanica
intro: Rosa × damascena var. balcanica, also known as the Balkan Damask rose, is a variety of the Rosa damascena species, a fragrant, flowering plant native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa × damascena var. balcanica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopausal hot flashes. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
